message:
fix(cancel): prevent orphaned pending symbols via completed-object tracking

CleanupCoordinator::register_pending could re-add symbols for an object
that was already cleared or cleaned up by a concurrent thread, creating
orphaned pending symbols that would never be drained.

Add a completed: RwLock<HashSet<ObjectId>> field to CleanupCoordinator.
register_pending now double-checks (once before acquiring the write
lock, once after) whether the object is in the completed set and returns
early if so. clear_pending and trigger_cleanup both add the object_id
to the completed set when removing pending symbols, closing the race
window.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
